title: Cobblemon Paradigm Addon
description: This is a group of fakemon I designed for my fangame!
body:
This is a group of fakemon from my fangame, Pokemon Paradigm. It'll get updated occasionally with new additions and revamps of old content.

# Currently includes:
- Roaroot, pure Grass type pre-evolution to Carnivine. Found in forests and swamps.
- Hydra'angea, Grass/Dragon evolution to Carnivine. Evolved by learning Echoed Voice at level 43. Can also be found extremely rarely in swamps.
- Chūnlong, Bug/Dragon evolution to Masquerain. Trade while holding a Dragon Scale to evolve.
- Dodetrad, Normal/Flying evolution to Dodrio. Evolves when learning the move Hurricane at level 49. Can also be found extremely rarely in Savannas.
- Penumbranch, Fire/Water evolution to Magcargo. Evolves when brough into a Warm Ocean.
- Hexonian Victreebel, Dark/Psychic regional form of Victreebel. Evolve from Weepinbell with a Ghast Tear.
